name: Rita Rudner
blurb: A former Broadway dancer, she turned to stand-up in the late 1970s after noticing the scarcity of female comedians in New York and became a fixture of late-night television and HBO specials.
bio: Rita Rudner is an American stand-up comedian and actress known for an elegant, soft-spoken delivery and tightly crafted one-liners about marriage, relationships, and womanhood. A former Broadway dancer, she turned to stand-up in the late 1970s after noticing the scarcity of female comedians in New York and became a fixture of late-night television and HBO specials. Since 2001 she has built one of the longest-running solo comedy residencies in Las Vegas.

timeline.ev: Network television debut on Late Night with David Letterman
HBO special Rita Rudner: Born to Be Mild
Begins long-running Las Vegas comedy residency

accolades: American Comedy Award for Funniest Female Stand-Up
Longest-running solo comedy show in Las Vegas history

specials.t: Rita Rudner: Born to Be Mild
